hooks.command: if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Ping.aiff & osascript -e 'display notification "許可の確認待ちです" with title "Claude Code"'; else powershell.exe -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; \$notify = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; \$notify.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; \$notify.Visible = \$true; \$notify.ShowBalloonTip(5000, 'Claude Code', '許可の確認待ちです', [System.Windows.Forms.ToolTipIcon]::Info); Start-Sleep -Seconds 3"; fi

if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Blow.aiff & osascript -e 'display notification "作業が完了しました" with title "Claude Code"'; else powershell.exe -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; \$notify = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; \$notify.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; \$notify.Visible = \$true; \$notify.ShowBalloonTip(5000, 'Claude Code', '作業が完了しました', [System.Windows.Forms.ToolTipIcon]::Info); Start-Sleep -Seconds 3"; fi
